name: Cabbage Aphid
affects: Cabbage, Cauliflower, Chinese Cabbage, Radish, Watercress, Lettuce
symptoms: Colonies feed on leaves, produce honeydew. Causes curling and stunting of leaves.
control: Spray with insecticide (Confidor/Malathion). Remove heavily infested leaves. Encourage natural predators.

name: Corn Ear Worm / Pod Borer
affects: Okra, Sweet Corn, Maize / Corn, Tomato, Eggplant, Capsicum, Chillies, Potato, Cowpea, Pigeon Pea, French Beans, Long Bean
symptoms: Bores holes in pods. Golden brown head with small bumps/spines. 2-3 generations per year.
control: Spray pods early with Cypermethrin or Chlorpyrifos. Monitor egg-laying on pods.

name: Large Cabbage Moth / Diamondback Moth
affects: Cabbage, Cauliflower, Chinese Cabbage, Radish, Watercress
symptoms: Older caterpillars feed under silk web on young leaves, petioles and growing point. Can damage entirely.
control: Spray with Bt (Bacillus thuringiensis) or Spinosad. Remove webbing manually.

name: Cowpea Weevil (Seed Storage)
affects: Cowpea, French Beans, Long Bean, Lablab Bean, Mung Bean, Peanut, Pigeon Pea, Urd Bean, Winged Bean
symptoms: Attacks pods in field and stored seeds. Round exit holes and white eggs on seed surface.
control: Store in sealed containers. Treat grain with diatomite or neem powder. Fumigate storage.

name: Dalo Beetle
affects: Dalo (Taro), Dalo ni Tana, CRP-URO, Yam
symptoms: Feeds on corms making large holes. Reduces market value. Causes corm rot. Adult 18-20mm.
control: Apply Carbofuran granules at planting. Remove and destroy infested corms. Crop rotation.

name: Leaf Miner
affects: Tomato, Eggplant, Capsicum, Chillies, Potato, French Beans, Long Bean, Cowpea, Lablab Bean, Mung Bean, Pigeon Pea, Urd Bean, Winged Bean, Lettuce, Okra, Cucumber, Zucchini
symptoms: Larvae tunnel (mine) between upper and lower leaf surfaces leaving winding trails.
control: Remove and destroy mined leaves. Spray with Abamectin or Spinosad. Sticky traps.

name: Centre Grub / Cabbage Webworm
affects: Cabbage, Cauliflower, Chinese Cabbage, Radish, Watercress
symptoms: Leaves webbed together or large blisters. Older plants appear stunted.
control: Spray young plants with Chlorpyrifos or Cypermethrin. Destroy infested growing points.

name: Tomato Fruit Borer
affects: Tomato, Eggplant, Capsicum, Chillies, Potato
symptoms: Bores from stem end, feeds on inner fruit. Causes decay from secondary infection.
control: Spray Chlorpyrifos or Lambda-cyhalothrin at first flower. Remove and destroy bored fruit.

name: Thrips (General)
affects: Capsicum, Chillies, Tomato, Eggplant, Potato, Onion, Garlic, Spring Onion, Cucumber, Gourd, Zucchini, Watermelon, Squash / Pumpkin, Cabbage, Cauliflower, Chinese Cabbage, Papaya, Pineapple, Dragon Fruit, FRT-MAN, Avocado, Citrus, Cumquat, Banana / Vudi, Plantain, Rockmelon / Cantaloupe, Passionfruit, Guava, Soursop
families: Solanaceae, Amaryllidaceae, Cucurbitaceae, Brassicaceae, Multiple fruit families
symptoms: Punctures cells with rasping-sucking mouthparts. Causes scarring, discolouration, deformation.
control: Spray Imidacloprid or Spinosad. Use blue sticky traps. Remove infested plant material.

name: Legume Pod Borer
affects: Pigeon Pea, French Beans, Long Bean, Cowpea, Lablab Bean, Mung Bean, Urd Bean, Winged Bean
symptoms: Young caterpillars feed on flowers and newly formed pods. Older caterpillars are highly mobile.
control: Spray Chlorpyrifos at flowering. Destroy infested pods immediately.

name: Fruit Fly (Queensland)
affects: Tomato, Eggplant, Capsicum, Chillies, Cucumber, Gourd, Zucchini, Watermelon, Squash / Pumpkin, Banana / Vudi, Pineapple, Papaya, Dragon Fruit, Guava, Breadfruit, Avocado, Cumquat, Plantain, Rockmelon / Cantaloupe, Passionfruit, Citrus, Soursop, FRT-MAN, Kura / Noni
symptoms: Lays eggs in fruit. Maggots cause sunken discoloured patches, distortions, open cracks. Entry points for fungi.
control: Protein bait + Malathion spray. Collect and bury fallen fruit. Male annihilation technique (MAT traps).

name: Spider Mite (Two-Spotted)
affects: Tomato, Eggplant, Capsicum, Chillies, Potato, Cucumber, Gourd, Zucchini, Watermelon, Squash / Pumpkin, Cassava, French Beans, Long Bean
symptoms: Feeds on foliage, stems, fruits. Blossoms shed. Fruits stunted with rusty/corky skin.
control: Spray Abamectin or Dicofol. Increase humidity around plants. Avoid broad-spectrum pesticides.

name: Eggplant Fruit and Shoot Borer
affects: Eggplant, Tomato, Potato
symptoms: Holes in fruit. Larvae tunnel into flesh causing internal rot. Entry holes visible.
control: Spray Chlorpyrifos or Cypermethrin early. Bag young fruit. Destroy infested fruits.

name: Palm Thrips
affects: Eggplant, Capsicum, Chillies, Tomato, Potato, Cucumber, Gourd, Zucchini
symptoms: Leaves curl, silvering/bronzing. Distorted new shoots. Stunted fruit set.
control: Spray Imidacloprid (Confidor). Remove heavily infested leaves. Monitor early.

name: Spider Mite (Beans)
affects: Eggplant, Tomato, Potato, French Beans, Long Bean, Cowpea, Mung Bean, Pigeon Pea, Winged Bean, Lablab Bean, Urd Bean
symptoms: Fine webbing on leaves. Yellow stippling. Leaf drop in heavy infestations.
control: Apply miticide (Abamectin). Increase humidity. Remove infested leaves. Avoid dusty conditions.

name: Kava Root Rot Weevil
affects: Kava
symptoms: Larvae bore into rootstock. Wilting and yellowing of kava plants. Root destruction.
control: Soil drench with Chlorpyrifos. Remove affected plants. Improve drainage.

name: Cassava Mealybug
affects: Cassava
symptoms: White waxy masses on stems and leaves. Stunted shoot tips. Yellowing.
control: Biological control with Epidinocarsis lopezi. Avoid importing infected cuttings.

name: Pineapple Mealybug
affects: Pineapple
symptoms: Wilt disease vector. Mealybug colonises roots and heart. Stunted plants.
control: Dip planting material in Chlorpyrifos. Ant control (ants protect mealybugs). Remove infected plants.

name: Sweetpotato Weevil
affects: Sweet Potato
symptoms: Larvae tunnel through tubers leaving frass-filled galleries. Foul smell. Tuber loss.
control: Use clean planting material. Earthing up. Harvest early. Cylas pheromone traps.

name: Taro Leaf Blight (Disease)
affects: Dalo (Taro), Dalo ni Tana, CRP-URO
symptoms: Water-soaked lesions on leaves. Brown rot extending to corm. Rapid collapse in wet conditions.
control: Plant TLB-resistant varieties. Copper-based fungicide. Improve airflow between plants.

name: Diamondback Moth (Bt-resistant strain)
affects: Cabbage, Cauliflower, Chinese Cabbage, Radish, Watercress
symptoms: Window-pane feeding on leaves. Small holes. Larvae visible under leaves.
control: Spray Bt (Bacillus thuringiensis) or Spinosad. Rotate insecticides to avoid resistance.

name: Banana Weevil Borer
affects: Banana / Vudi, Plantain
symptoms: Larvae bore into corm. Yellowing and lodging. Significant yield reduction.
control: Use clean suckers. Pseudostem traps. Dimethoate soil application. Remove crop debris.

name: Tomato Leafminer
affects: Tomato, Eggplant, Capsicum, Chillies, Potato
symptoms: Mines in leaves visible as white trails. Frass in galleries. Defoliation in heavy attack.
control: Pheromone traps. Spray Chlorantraniliprole or Spinosad. Remove and destroy affected leaves.

name: Green Vegetable Bug
affects: Tomato, Eggplant, Capsicum, Chillies, Potato, French Beans, Long Bean, Cowpea, Lablab Bean, Mung Bean, Pigeon Pea, Urd Bean, Winged Bean, Dalo (Taro), Sweet Corn, Maize / Corn
symptoms: Feeding causes distorted fruits and pods. Seed damage. Characteristic smell.
control: Hand-pick adults. Spray Cypermethrin or Malathion. Destroy crop debris.

name: Red Spider Mite (Citrus)
affects: Citrus, Cumquat, Papaya
symptoms: Bronzing of leaves. Stippling damage. Leaf drop in severe cases.
control: Abamectin or Spiromesifen spray. Avoid water stress. Destroy infested leaves.

name: Aphids (General Tropical)
affects: Eggplant, Capsicum, Chillies, Tomato, Potato, Cabbage, Cauliflower, Chinese Cabbage, Radish, Watercress, Cucumber, Gourd, Zucchini, Lettuce, Okra, Amaranthus, Spring Onion, Onion, Garlic
families: Solanaceae, Brassicaceae, Cucurbitaceae, Asteraceae, Malvaceae, Amaranthaceae, Amaryllidaceae
symptoms: Curling leaves. Sticky honeydew. Sooty mould growth. Vector for virus diseases.
control: Spray Imidacloprid or Malathion. Encourage ladybird beetles. Remove heavily infested shoots.

name: Melon Fruit Fly
affects: Cucumber, Gourd, Zucchini, Watermelon, Squash / Pumpkin, Rockmelon / Cantaloupe
symptoms: Larvae inside fruit cause rot. Fruit drop. Entry holes with oozing.
control: Protein bait + Malathion spray. Cover young fruit. Destroy fallen fruit immediately.

name: Oriental Fruit Fly
affects: Papaya, FRT-MAN, Avocado, Banana / Vudi, Plantain, Guava, Citrus, Cumquat, Dragon Fruit, Soursop, Passionfruit, Breadfruit, Kura / Noni
families: Caricaceae, Anacardiaceae, Lauraceae, Musaceae, Myrtaceae, Rutaceae, Cactaceae, Annonaceae, Passifloraceae, Moraceae, Rubiaceae
symptoms: Larvae inside fruit. Premature fruit drop. Bacterial secondary rots.
control: Methyl eugenol traps. Protein bait + insecticide. Destroy fallen fruit. No-host buffer zones.

name: Root Knot Nematode
affects: Tomato, Eggplant, Capsicum, Chillies, Potato, Carrot, Okra, Cucumber, Gourd, Zucchini, Squash / Pumpkin, Watermelon, Sweet Potato, Cassava, Dalo (Taro), Dalo ni Tana, Yam, CRP-URO, Ginger, Turmeric, Cardamom, Kawai / Jicama, Lettuce, Cabbage
families: Solanaceae, Apiaceae, Malvaceae, Cucurbitaceae, Convolvulaceae, Euphorbiaceae, Araceae, Dioscoreaceae, Zingiberaceae, Fabaceae, Asteraceae, Brassicaceae
symptoms: Galls on roots. Stunted yellowing plants. Wilting during heat of day.
control: Soil solarisation. Marigold intercrop. Nematicide (Carbofuran) if severe. Crop rotation.

name: Coconut Rhinoceros Beetle
affects: Coconut
symptoms: V-cuts in unopened fronds. Damage to palm hearts. Oviposition in decaying matter.
control: Remove breeding sites (dead wood, compost piles). Oryctes baculovirus biocontrol. Traps.

name: Black Cutworm
affects: Eggplant, Tomato, Capsicum, Chillies, Potato, Cabbage, Cauliflower, Chinese Cabbage, Cucumber, Gourd, Zucchini, Lettuce, Okra, Carrot, Sweet Corn, Maize / Corn
families: Solanaceae, Brassicaceae, Cucurbitaceae, Asteraceae, Malvaceae, Apiaceae, Poaceae
symptoms: Cut stems at soil level overnight. Seedling death. Caterpillar found in soil near damage.
control: Soil tillage to expose larvae. Bran bait with Carbaryl. Spray Chlorpyrifos at base.

name: Leaf-footed Bug
affects: Tomato, Eggplant, Capsicum, Chillies, Potato, Squash / Pumpkin, Watermelon, Gourd, Zucchini, Cucumber, Sweet Corn, Maize / Corn, Rockmelon / Cantaloupe
symptoms: Piercing feeding on young fruit. Deformed fruit. Corky patches.
control: Hand-pick adults. Spray Cypermethrin. Destroy crop debris.

name: Sugarcane Leafhopper
affects: Sugarcane, Napier Grass, Sweet Corn, Maize / Corn, Rice (Dryland), Rice (Wetland), Sorghum, Duruka
symptoms: White stippling on leaves. Honeydew leading to sooty mould. Stunted ratoons.
control: Predatory wasps (Paranagrus optabilis). Imidacloprid soil application. Clean ratoons.

name: Varroa Mite
affects: Apiculture (Honey + Pollination)
symptoms: Weakened bee colony. Deformed wings. Brood death. Colony collapse if untreated.
control: Oxalic acid treatment. Apistan strips. Monitor mite levels. Re-queen from resistant stock.

name: American Foulbrood
affects: Apiculture (Honey + Pollination)
symptoms: Sunken perforated cappings. Brown ropy larval remains. Foul smell.
control: Burn infected hive and equipment. Antibiotics under vet supervision. Notify biosecurity.

name: Ginger Shoot Borer
affects: Ginger, Turmeric, Cardamom
symptoms: Tunnelling in pseudostems. Deadheart (central shoot dies). Frass at entry.
control: Remove and destroy infested shoots. Spray Chlorpyrifos at shoot base. Earthing up.

name: Ginger Root Rot Fly
affects: Ginger, Turmeric, Cardamom
symptoms: Larvae bore into rhizomes causing soft rot. Yellowing and wilting.
control: Treat seed rhizomes before planting. Soil drench Chlorpyrifos. Remove affected clumps.

name: Green Peach Aphid
affects: Capsicum, Chillies, Eggplant, Tomato, Potato, Cabbage, Cauliflower, Chinese Cabbage, Radish, Lettuce, Cucumber, Zucchini
symptoms: Curling leaves. Virus vector. Sooty mould from honeydew.
control: Yellow sticky traps. Imidacloprid or Pymetrozine. Remove infested shoots.

name: Banana Aphid
affects: Banana / Vudi, Plantain
symptoms: Virus vector (Banana Bunchy Top Virus). Colonies in leaf base axils.
control: Destroy infected plants. Spray Imidacloprid. Use clean suckers only.

name: Cassava Green Mite
affects: Cassava
symptoms: Chlorotic spots on young leaves. Distorted leaf tips. Stunted growth.
control: Introduce predatory mite (Typhlodromalus aripo). Avoid drought stress. Abamectin if severe.

name: Wax Moth
affects: Apiculture (Honey + Pollination)
symptoms: Silken tunnels in hive. Wax moth larvae destroy combs. Colony weakening.
control: Maintain strong colonies. Freeze combs before storage. Bacillus thuringiensis spray on stored combs.

name: Spotted Cucumber Beetle
affects: Cucumber, Gourd, Zucchini, Squash / Pumpkin, Watermelon, Rockmelon / Cantaloupe
symptoms: Feeding on leaves, flowers, roots. Adults vector bacterial wilt.
control: Row covers on seedlings. Kaolin clay. Pyrethrin spray. Trap crops (squash).

name: Taro Hawk Moth
affects: Dalo (Taro), Dalo ni Tana, CRP-URO
symptoms: Larvae feed on taro leaves. Large irregular holes. Defoliation in outbreak.
control: Hand-pick larvae. Bt spray on young larvae. Encourage natural parasitoids.
